title: Lucky Egg Official Grab the Mic – Family Karaoke Game, 8+ Year Olds, 2-10 Players - Board Game for Bad Singers with 250 Lyrics (125 Cards) for Hilarious Nights & Birthday Party, Kids Gift
features: THE KARAOKE GAME FOR PEOPLE WHO CAN’T SING - Grab The Mic is the ultimate karaoke-style game for those who love music but might not have the singing skills!
FAST-PACED FUN - Flip a card, think quickly, and race to grab the foam microphone to sing a lyric containing the revealed word. It's a fast-paced game that keeps everyone on their toes!
HILARIOUS MOMENTS - Watch as your friends try to recall lyrics under pressure, resulting in hilarious renditions of popular songs. It's guaranteed to have everyone laughing and singing along!

VERSATILE GAMEPLAY - Featuring a game board with multiple game modes, Grab The Mic offers various levels of challenge and keeps the fun fresh every time, Switch up the board for a new experience, creating endless musical battles that never get old!
WHAT’S INSIDE - With 125 word cards, a foam microphone, game board, player tokens, and easy-to-follow instructions, everything you need for a memorable game night is included.
